name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: seo_optimization
prompts.template: Optimize the following content for SEO using these keywords: {keywords}. Content: {content_data}
prompts.use_case: Enhancing marketing copy for higher conversion rates in digital campaigns.

prompts.name: copywriting_improvement
prompts.template: Improve this marketing copy to increase engagement and conversions: {content_data}
prompts.use_case: Optimizing website content for improved search engine ranking and visibility.

prompts.name: analytics_insights
prompts.template: Analyze this analytics data and provide actionable insights to enhance marketing performance: {analytics_data}
prompts.use_case: Generating analytics-driven reports to inform marketing decision-making.

prompts.name: growth_strategy_suggestion
prompts.template: Based on the following marketing goal and analytics data, suggest growth engineering strategies: Goal: {marketing_goal}, Analytics: {analytics_data}
prompts.use_case: Designing and implementing growth engineering strategies to scale online presence.
